highlights: Architected and developed responsive user interfaces using React, improving application performance by 35% and enhancing user experience across multiple platforms.
Designed and deployed backend services using Node.js and Python (Django), building scalable REST APIs capable of handling 1000+ concurrent users.

Developed enterprise-grade solutions leveraging Microsoft Power Platform including PowerApps (Canvas & Model-driven apps), Power BI dashboards, Power Automate workflows, and seamless SharePoint integration.
Built innovative AI-powered solutions using Ollama, RAG framework, and Agentic AI, demonstrating expertise in modern generative AI and intelligent automation systems.

Implemented Azure-based AI solutions utilizing Azure AI Document Intelligence (Document Intelligence Studio) to develop custom document extraction models, including end-to-end training, testing, and deployment. Integrated these models into automation workflows and applications (Power Automate, PowerApps) for intelligent data extraction and process automation.
